news.t: Aberdeen Investments Expands Active ETF Suite with Fixed Income and International Small Cap

holdings.infoBox: AGEM is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings.

overview.description: The abrdn Emerging Markets Dividend Active ETF (AGEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund actively invests in dividend paying companies from emerging markets, selected based on proprietary quality and fundamental factors. AGEM was launched on Feb 18, 2025 and is issued by aberdeen.

data.title: Aberdeen Investments Expands Active ETF Suite with Fixed Income and International Small Cap
data.text: U.S. ETF suite surpasses $18 billion AUM1 PHILADELPHIA , Oct. 20, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Aberdeen Investments, the U.S. arm of the global specialist asset manager, today announced the expansion of its a...
